Hyun Seok Sung is the #1,493 ranked MMA fighter in the Asia Pacific region. Sung is also ranked in 2 Asia Pacific sub-regions (China, South Korea). He is only ranked in regions where he has fought at least 2 times out of his last 6 MMA bouts.

Sung is ranked at Lightweight in each region, since he fought at least once in the weight class in his last 2 fights.
